Frozen Pioneer Bow

When attacking, has a [20%-22%] chance of dealing [75%-90%] damage to a group of enemies.
Once in a while, the unit steals 20% damage from all enemies for 3 sec and launches a volley of arrows. Every 0,5 sec for 3 sec, all enemies take physical damage equal to 100% of the bow owner's attack and have a 35% chance to become stunned for 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
